# Current plan pointer file

Worktree-level pointer artifact at `.local/harness/current-plan.json`.

- Schema JSON: [current-plan.schema.json](../../../../schema/artifacts/current-plan.schema.json)
- Registry entry: [schema/index.json](../../../../schema/index.json)
- Go type: `github.com/catu-ai/easyharness/internal/contracts.CurrentPlanFile`

## Root Shape

CurrentPlanFile is the worktree-level pointer file under `.local/harness/current-plan.json`.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `last_landed_at` | `string` | no | LastLandedAt is the timestamp of the most recent landed plan. |
| `last_landed_plan_path` | `string` | no | LastLandedPlanPath is the most recent landed plan path when the worktree is otherwise idle. |
| `plan_path` | `string` | no | PlanPath is the current active or archived plan path when work is in flight. |

## Definitions

## CurrentPlanFile

CurrentPlanFile is the worktree-level pointer file under `.local/harness/current-plan.json`.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `last_landed_at` | `string` | no | LastLandedAt is the timestamp of the most recent landed plan. |
| `last_landed_plan_path` | `string` | no | LastLandedPlanPath is the most recent landed plan path when the worktree is otherwise idle. |
| `plan_path` | `string` | no | PlanPath is the current active or archived plan path when work is in flight. |
